rounds: Two weeks of holding the line on routine — that's not nothing, that's actually a win. The jockstrap to work, the crop top, whatever you've been quietly wearing — you kept doing it. But the Apollo ring moment? That one went to the Joy Police. Colleague asks, you fold. The ring stayed on your finger but you pulled it off in every way that mattered.
pattern: They're fine with you wearing the gay stuff — they just won't let you *say* it out loud.
focus: One sentence. Next time someone notices something, you give them one true sentence back.
